best_for: Low opening deposit with high APY
perks: Strong 4.50% APY with only $25 minimum to open
Full FDIC-insured bank (not just a fintech)
ATM card available with checking account
Pair with LendingClub Rewards Checking for combined benefits
drawbacks: Smaller bank with less brand recognition
Limited customer service hours vs. big banks
Mobile app not as polished as Ally or Capital One
